description: A high-tier loyalty member is checking in. The agent needs to acknowledge their status and provide an upgrade.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the reservation and identify the guest's VIP loyalty status from an alert on the screen.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the guest as a VIP.
Agent finds an available junior suite for an upgrade.

nodes.task_description: Welcome the guest, acknowledge their loyalty, and inform them of their complimentary upgrade to a junior suite.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides excellent customer service and successfully processes the room upgrade.
